headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on L3Harris Technologies, Lowers Price Target to $330
summary: UBS  analyst Myles Walton   maintains L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $362 to $330.

headline: What Surprises Investors Should Expect From April 2026's Jobs Report
